JOSAT

________________________________________

Journal of Science, Art and Technology-JOSAT (June-December) is an interdisciplinary peer-reviewed, open-access electronic scientific journal published twice a year, aiming to convey the latest developments in science, engineering and architecture.

The journal accepts research articles, review articles, short communication articles, technical notes and letters to the editor in which scientific research methods are applied in the fields of Electrical-Electronics, Industrial, Civil, Computer and Software Engineering, as well as Architecture, Interior Architecture and Environmental Design, and Industrial Design.

Articles submitted by the authors are evaluated by the editorial board and referees, and a double-blind refereeing process is applied.

JOSAT journal does not charge any fees from authors or readers during the article acceptance and publication processes.

Although the language of the journal is Turkish, English articles are also included. In addition to academics, articles by expert researchers are also evaluated in the journal.
